# runtime-benchmark-plan-docs-runtime-eval

## Stack
JSON and docs fixture

## Test Command
test_cmd: grep -q "src/tui/agent/session_bridge.rs" .obstral/runtime_eval.json && grep -q "src/tui/agent/session_bridge.rs" docs/runtime-architecture.md

## Development Rules
- Read `.obstral/runtime_eval.json` before editing it.
- Read `docs/runtime-architecture.md` before editing it.
- Make the smallest updates that satisfy the approved Observer benchmark plan.
- Run the configured grep command before calling done.
